benefits.description: Dull shoulder ache resolved within one week of site injection into side delt; shoulder felt lubricated like WD-40 was applied
Accelerated recovery process; returned to playing pickleball with dominant arm by week 12 and resumed heavy lifting

protocol_notes: Injected Wolverine compound (BPC-157/TB-500 stack) into side delt starting at 10 weeks post-op from RC, labrum and bicep tenodesis surgery. Now uses pinning into RC as needed for recovery and overuse stress. Also reported a buddy's similar positive results: .30 cc twice a day initially, then .20 cc twice a day for 8 weeks.
